acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A closed or missing claimed Issue in capacity_waiting releases its local and remote claim
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Regression coverage proves missing and terminal waiters invoke remote release and remove local claim, queue, and repository reservation state.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: An unroutable waiting Issue cannot block another Issue in the same repository
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Regression coverage proves an unroutable waiter is released and a subsequent same-repository candidate becomes dispatchable.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A valid waiting claim remains recoverable without consuming an Attempt or retry budget
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Regression coverage proves valid owned waiters are refreshed and heartbeated while retaining queue attempt 3 and an empty retry-attempt map.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Full Elixir gate passes with 100 percent coverage, Credo and Dialyzer
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: 363 tests pass; coverage is 100.00%; specs/strict Credo and Dialyzer pass with zero findings.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test --cover
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix lint
checks.summary: Public-spec check and strict Credo pass with no issues.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix dialyzer
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix format --check-formatted

checks.summary: No whitespace errors in the complete issue diff.
Worktree is clean after committing exact tested HEAD.

residualRisk.risk: Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification are delivery-coordinator responsibilities after independent review and merge.
residualRisk.mitigation: Symphony will bind deployment verification to the exact merged commit before terminal completion.
